caption: A series of large, industrial transport cases with metal edges and reinforced corners are lined up in a row inside a warehouse or storage facility with a brick wall and concrete floor. The cases are color-coded, featuring yellow and blue exteriors, and are equipped with handles, latches, and wheels. Some cases are marked with single letters such as "E", "A", and "D". The camera first provides a wide view of the row of cases, shifting perspective slightly to show the sequence of colors and labels. Finally, the scene transitions to a close-up shot where a person's dark-skinned hand reaches down to operate a silver metal latch on the top of a yellow case, flipping the mechanism to unlock it.
